programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth or Deception New
programme.desc: Jesse Holton sits down for a high stakes polygraph test with retired FBI examiner George Olivo. In 2016, Jesse became a suspect after a dispute with his parents ended in their brutal deaths. Although prosecutors dropped the charges on the eve of his trial due to lack of evidence, Jesse--now a free man--still lives under the shadow of those accusations. He hopes the polygraph test will finally show the truth is on his side.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth or Deception New
programme.desc: Years after beloved actor Gary Coleman's controversial and tragic death, his ex-wife, Shannon Price, agrees to take a polygraph test to confront lingering suspicions and silence the rumors that she was responsible for his death.
